newsletter.name: Scale to Billions
newsletter.description: Weekly deep-dives on system design, distributed systems, and engineering career growth. Join thousands of engineers who read my technical articles.

articles.title: Understanding Database Transactions: The Backbone of Reliable Data
articles.description: A deep dive into ACID properties, isolation levels, and how modern databases ensure data consistency in distributed environments.

articles.title: Gossip Protocol: Failure Detection in Distributed Systems
articles.description: How distributed systems use gossip-based protocols to detect failures, maintain membership, and achieve eventual consistency at scale.

articles.title: Bloom Filter — A Probabilistic Data Structure
articles.description: Understanding how Bloom filters work, their probabilistic guarantees, and practical applications in databases, caches, and network systems.

articles.title: When You Should Choose Serverless Architecture?
articles.description: A practical guide to evaluating when serverless is the right fit for your application — trade-offs, use cases, and decision frameworks.

articles.title: What is Geospatial Index?
articles.description: How geospatial indexes power location-based queries in databases — from R-trees to geohashing and their real-world applications.

articles.title: How Live Streaming Videos Reach You with Minimum Latency
articles.description: The complete pipeline behind live video streaming — from encoding and CDN distribution to adaptive bitrate and latency optimization.

articles.title: Maintaining Database Atomicity and Durability with Write-Ahead Logging
articles.description: Deep dive into Write-Ahead Logging (WAL) — how databases use sequential log writes to guarantee crash recovery and transaction durability.

youtube.description: In-depth technical videos on system design, distributed systems, and engineering career guidance.
